0.q: MbCBL4 overexpression in Arabidopsis: SOD and CAT activities rose by 47% and 28%, while H₂O₂ and O₂⁻ levels declined by 46% and 38%. MbCBL4 enhances salt tolerance by promoting antioxidant capacity and reactive oxygen species scavenging.

1.q: Protein–protein interaction assays (Y2H and LCI) verified physical interaction of MbCBL1/MbCIPK18 and MbCBL4/MbCIPK18.

2.q: Protein–protein interaction assays (Y2H and LCI) verified physical interaction of MbCBL1/MbCIPK18 and MbCBL4/MbCIPK18.

4.q: Calcineurin B-like protein (CBLs) and CBL-interacting protein kinase (CIPKs) are important components of the Ca2+-mediated signal pathway.
